strategy: Never cast any spell that targets Lady Stonegaze — including AoEs. Doing so Polymorphs you into a Statue for 99 rounds, which effectively benches you the whole fight.
Buff only yourself. Blades cast on you are fine because they do not target her.
At the end of every other round each un-statued wizard is handed one Blindfolded Hit (random school). These are the only spells allowed to touch her.
Kill her exclusively with a Blindfolded Hit. If she is defeated by anything else, she casts a Moon Blessing and heals to 100%.
Stack self-blades between hands so one Blindfolded Hit finishes her (4,500 health, no resist).
cheatNotes: Casting anything at her — even an AoE — turns you to stone for 99 rounds. Only ever use the Blindfolded Hits she gives you.
The Statue polymorph deck is 77 Pass cards and a single Break Free, so being turned to stone removes you from the fight.
Killing her with anything other than a Blindfolded Hit triggers a full 100% heal. Save the finishing blow for a Blindfolded Hit.
Every other round each wizard who is not a statue receives one Blindfolded Hit of a random school — your only legal way to damage her.
